name: Trellix DLP
description: Integrates with Trellix Data Loss Prevention REST API for incident retrieval, policy management, and event monitoring across endpoint, network, and cloud channels

actions.name: List Incidents
actions.description: Retrieve DLP incidents for data-in-use, data-in-motion, or data-at-rest with filtering options

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for incident query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for incident query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity (critical, high, medium, low)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of incidents to return

actions.name: Get Incident Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific DLP incident including matched content and policy details

parameters.name: incidentId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the DLP incident

actions.name: List DLP Policies
actions.description: Retrieve all configured DLP policies from the Trellix DLP Manager

actions.name: Apply DLP Policy
actions.description: Apply a DLP policy to specified endpoints or network segments

parameters.name: policyId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the DLP policy to apply

parameters.name: targets
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of target system IDs or group names

actions.name: Get DLP Events
actions.description: Retrieve DLP events including data classification, transfer, and policy violation events

parameters.name: eventType
parameters.description: Filter by event type (incident, classification, transfer)

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for event query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for event query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return

actions.name: Update Incident Status
actions.description: Update the status or assign a reviewer to a DLP incident

parameters.name: incidentId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the incident to update

parameters.name: reviewer
parameters.description: Reviewer to assign to the incident
